name: Git Platform CLIs
description: Installs CLIs for all major git hosting platforms: gh (GitHub), glab (GitLab), gitea (Gitea/Forgejo), tea (Gitea legacy), hub (GitHub legacy), bb (Bitbucket). Provides a unified toolbelt for cross-platform repo management from within the devcontainer.

gh_version.description: GitHub CLI version. 'latest' installs the current release.

glab_version.description: GitLab CLI version. 'latest' installs the current release.

gitea_version.description: Gitea CLI (tea) version. 'latest' installs the current release.

install_hub.description: Install hub (legacy GitHub CLI). Disabled by default — gh supersedes it.

install_bb.description: Install bb (Bitbucket CLI via pip). Disabled by default.

install_forgejo_cli.description: Install forgejo-cli (Forgejo/Gitea v1.21+ API client). Disabled by default.
